mapper.select: SELECT * FROM SY_ROLE_GROUP WHERE ROLE_GROUP_ID = #{roleGroupId} AND CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId}
SELECT * FROM SY_ROLE_GROUP WHERE ROLE_GROUP_NO = #{roleGroupNo} AND CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId}
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM SY_ROLE_GROUP WHERE ROLE_GROUP_ID = #{roleGroupId} AND CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE SY_ROLE_GROUP SET JOIN_DEFAULT = #{joinDefault}, CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId}, UPDATE_DATE = sysdate, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID}, ORDERNO = #{orderNo}, ACTIVITY = #{activity}, SYS_TYPE = #{sysType}
WHERE ROLE_GROUP_NO = #{roleGroupNo}
mapper.delete: UPDATE SY_ROLE_GROUP SET ACTIVITY = 0, UPDATE_DATE = sysdate, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID} WHERE ROLE_GROUP_ID = #{roleGroupId}
